output: copy C:\Windows\System32\WorkFolders.exe C:\Temp\WF.exe && cd C:\Temp && WF.exe
explanation: The Sigma rule explicitly looks for a ParentImage ending in '\WorkFolders.exe'. By copying or renaming the legitimate WorkFolders executable to another name (such as WF.exe) and executing it, the resulting telemetry will show a ParentImage of '\WF.exe'. This completely bypasses the selection criteria of the rule while still allowing the WorkFolders component to execute the arbitrary control.exe payload in the current directory.
